model: v20clean 3-seed club ensemble + v21goal blend w=0.65 (lineup-aware)
confirmed_lineup_note: Both XIs 11/11 from ESPN summary (event 401896235). 14/22 player embeddings matched, ASYMMETRIC: Hajduk Split (home) 5/11, Pafos (away) 9/11.

bets.staking_method: Half-Kelly/8%-cap formula would give roughly EUR9-10 for this edge/odds combo. Recommendation ahead of the bet was EUR3-4 given the home-side data gap (Hajduk 5/11 vs Pafos 9/11 embeddings) -- user opted for EUR10, closer to full formula size, overriding the downsize recommendation.

excluded_legs_note: Home win (-14.1pp edge, -29.6% EV) and Draw (-2.7pp edge, -9.1% EV) both excluded as no-bets.
data_note: 14/22 embeddings, asymmetric 5/11 (Hajduk) vs 9/11 (Pafos) -- pre-bet recommendation was to downsize to EUR3-4 on this basis; user chose EUR10 instead.
provenance_note: Prediction generated pre-kickoff from confirmed XIs; bet placed at Unibet around the 19:00Z kickoff; this commit logged minutes after kickoff, before any result information. Not a pre-kickoff-proof pick per the strict standard.
